short_summary: Iran deal, Cuba sanctions, DNI pick
rationale: Trump's announced US-Iran settlement is a major new domestic and foreign policy development with real implications for oil prices and US global posture; Cuba sanctions and DNI nomination continue active policy churn directly affecting American life.

top_events.title: Trump says US and Iran reached a 'great settlement'
top_events.summary: A claimed US-Iran nuclear or sanctions deal would be a major foreign policy event with direct impact on oil prices, Middle East stability, and US political debate — highly relevant to American consumers and voters.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company
top_events.summary: New Cuba sanctions and Hegseth's Guantánamo visit signal continued hardline posture; affects Cuban-American communities and US-Latin America relations.

top_events.title: Trump to pick Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence
top_events.summary: A new DNI nomination continues reshaping of US intelligence leadership under Trump, with downstream effects on domestic security and oversight.
